_README: Copy to secrets.json and fill in. secrets.json is gitignored -- never commit it.
_where: Onshape -> My Account -> Developer -> API keys. https://cad.onshape.com/appstore/dev-portal
_scopes: Read is enough for export. This tool never writes to Onshape.
_limit: Individual accounts are capped at 2 active API keys. Revoke and reissue rather than making a third.
